# User Story

As an exporter I want to be navigated to the upload file page when I select the back button on the /what-are-you-exporting page when doing a CSV upload
So that I am directed to the correct page

## Acceptance Criteria

### Scenario 1
- Given I have elected to do a CSV upload on a catch certificate journey
- I have uploaded a valid CSV file at /file-upload
  And I have selected to save and continue
- And I have been navigated to the /what-are-you-exporting page
- When I select the "Back" button
- Then I will be navigated to the /upload-file page
- Update any relevant tests to reflect this change as appropriate

> Note: Currently the journey navigates back to /add-exporter-details which is incorrect
